headline: U.S. orders staff to leave Saudi Arabia as war spreads; Iran rules out immediate ceasefire
summary: The U.S. ordered non-emergency government staff to leave Saudi Arabia as the widening Iran war rattled global markets.

raw.headline: U.S. orders staff to leave Saudi Arabia as war spreads; Iran rules out immediate ceasefire

headline: CNBC Daily Open: Oil surges past $100 per barrel as Iran war rages
summary: Shortly after the surge, U.S. President Donald Trump said on Truth Social that "short term oil prices" are "a very small price to pay".

raw.headline: CNBC Daily Open: Oil surges past $100 per barrel as Iran war rages

headline: Asia markets moderate losses after reported Saudi oil release slightly ease prices
summary: Markets cut losses later in the session as a reported release of Saudi Arabian crude on the market eased oil prices.

raw.headline: Asia markets moderate losses after reported Saudi oil release slightly ease prices

headline: Stocks pare losses as oil falls back below $100; Dow is down 300 points: Live updates
summary: The Dow recorded its worst week since President Trump unveiled his tariff policy in April.
